Meta.title: Launchpad Studio | Custom Web Development & E‑commerce
Meta.description: Custom websites and web applications—multilingual when you need it, scoped to your budget. WordPress, modern frameworks, and performance-minded delivery.

hero.title: Websites and apps shaped around your goals
hero.lead: We are not limited to WordPress. We ship multilingual experiences, modern stacks, and pragmatic CMS choices—scoped to your roadmap and budget, with performance and SEO baked in from the start.

services.title: Services
services.intro: End-to-end WordPress expertise—from custom themes to commerce—delivered with the same care we bring to typography and performance.
services.customBody: Tailored WordPress sites aligned with your brand, content model, and growth plans.
services.perfBody: Core Web Vitals, caching, and search-friendly structure so pages load fast and read clearly to humans and crawlers.
services.ecomBody: WooCommerce or other platforms—integrations and checkout flows that stay fast and maintainable as you grow.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.intro: Long-term relationships matter. Below are sample testimonials—swap in real quotes and logos when you have client permission.
reviews.t1: They documented everything: hosting, backups, how to update content. We finally felt in control of our site.
reviews.t2: Scope and timeline were clear from day one. No surprise invoices, and the shop stayed fast after launch.
reviews.t3: Professional communication and quick responses. Our team could focus on campaigns instead of fixing the CMS.

trust.title: Credibility & clarity
trust.intro: Trust comes from predictable process, honest communication, and respect for your data and intellectual property.
trust.card1Text: You get a clear proposal: deliverables, timeline, and what is not included—before work begins.
trust.card2Text: SSL, sensible permissions, updates, and backups—explained in plain language so your team stays safe.
trust.card3Text: Source code, theme files, and documentation are yours. No lock-in tactics—we want you to succeed independently.
trust.card4Text: Defined handoff and a reasonable post-launch window so you are not left alone the week you go live.

stats.s3: Typical first reply on new inquiries
stats.disclaimer: Figures are representative—replace with your verified numbers when you publish.

tools.title: Tools we build great software with
tools.body: From content platforms to full-stack apps—frameworks, infra, and design tools chosen for clarity, performance, and long-term maintainability.

about.title: Launchpad Studio
about.body: We are developers and designers who treat every build like a product: clear architecture, restrained aesthetics, and outcomes you can measure. Whether the right fit is WordPress, a headless stack, or something in between—including multilingual and multi-market delivery—we align scope with what you can invest and what you need to ship next.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Share a few details about your project. We reply within two business days.
contact.phMessage: Tell us about your goals, timeline, and links.
contact.privacy: We use your name, email, and message only to reply to this inquiry. We do not sell your data or add you to marketing lists without consent.

footer.tagline: Custom web development and e-commerce—clear scope, secure delivery, and documentation your team can rely on.
footer.emailNote: Replace the email above with your real business address before you go live.

Portfolio.flipHintDesktop: Hover or click the card to flip the case summary.
Portfolio.sectionIntro: Scroll sideways to browse. Flip each card to swap the full preview for the in-card case summary—then open the long write-up on its own page.
